- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build:packages`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter web typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build:web`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Relevant manual checks documented below

- Describe any browser, CLI, self-hosting, or migration checks you ran.

- Does this change docs, setup, or security guidance?
